markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Evaluate GrowthX's AI-powered content creation service for BitSight.](https://fathom.video/share/ksZD4cX6CMXABFzbNjvDSpNoLfsrap7T?tab=summary&timestamp=35.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**End-to-End Partnership:** GrowthX acts as an extension of the BitSight team, handling all content creation, SEO/AEO optimization, and direct publishing to `bitsight.com`.](https://fathom.video/share/ksZD4cX6CMXABFzbNjvDSpNoLfsrap7T?tab=summary&timestamp=909.0)
  - [**AI-Powered, Expert-Guided:** The service uses sophisticated AI workflows for drafting and fact-checking, but all strategy, setup, and final review are managed by human experts (e.g., a former TechCrunch EIC).](https://fathom.video/share/ksZD4cX6CMXABFzbNjvDSpNoLfsrap7T?tab=summary&timestamp=909.0)
  - [**Phased Engagement:** An 8-week Strategy Sprint builds a custom content OS (personas, voice, roadmap). Publishing begins in week 5, and BitSight can opt out before the 12-month execution phase.](https://fathom.video/share/ksZD4cX6CMXABFzbNjvDSpNoLfsrap7T?tab=summary&timestamp=1057.0)
  - [**Limited Availability:** Due to high demand and a human-heavy model, new client kickoffs are booked through the end of 2025, with the next openings in January/February 2026.](https://fathom.video/share/ksZD4cX6CMXABFzbNjvDSpNoLfsrap7T?tab=summary&timestamp=1712.0)

## Topics

### BitSight's Content Challenge & Goals

  - [**Goal:** Scale content creation to capture a vast number of LLM-related search queries.](https://fathom.video/share/ksZD4cX6CMXABFzbNjvDSpNoLfsrap7T?tab=summary&timestamp=73.0)
  - [**Constraint:** Limited internal resources (one full-time content person, basic ChatGPT use).](https://fathom.video/share/ksZD4cX6CMXABFzbNjvDSpNoLfsrap7T?tab=summary&timestamp=168.0)
  - [**Need:** A scalable solution that avoids hiring another dedicated person and provides clear ROI reporting.](https://fathom.video/share/ksZD4cX6CMXABFzbNjvDSpNoLfsrap7T?tab=summary&timestamp=196.0)

### GrowthX's Solution: The "Content OS"

  - [**Model:** A "services as software" partnership combining AI workflows with human expertise.](https://fathom.video/share/ksZD4cX6CMXABFzbNjvDSpNoLfsrap7T?tab=summary&timestamp=928.0)
  - [**Process:**](https://fathom.video/share/ksZD4cX6CMXABFzbNjvDSpNoLfsrap7T?tab=summary&timestamp=1057.0)
    1.  **8-Week Strategy Sprint:**
          - [**Goal:** Build a custom "Content OS" to align AI output with BitSight's brand and audience.](https://fathom.video/share/ksZD4cX6CMXABFzbNjvDSpNoLfsrap7T?tab=summary&timestamp=1057.0)
          - [**Deliverables:**](https://fathom.video/share/ksZD4cX6CMXABFzbNjvDSpNoLfsrap7T?tab=summary&timestamp=1057.0)
              - [**SEO Analysis:** Keyword research (Ahrefs/SEMrush) and content refresh opportunities.](https://fathom.video/share/ksZD4cX6CMXABFzbNjvDSpNoLfsrap7T?tab=summary&timestamp=1347.0)
              - [**Topic Clusters:** A roadmap of assignments to build authority.](https://fathom.video/share/ksZD4cX6CMXABFzbNjvDSpNoLfsrap7T?tab=summary&timestamp=1347.0)
              - [**Artifacts:** Detailed personas, company context, and writing guidelines.](https://fathom.video/share/ksZD4cX6CMXABFzbNjvDSpNoLfsrap7T?tab=summary&timestamp=1057.0)
              - [**Knowledge Base:** Ingests BitSight assets (decks, transcripts) to ground AI output.](https://fathom.video/share/ksZD4cX6CMXABFzbNjvDSpNoLfsrap7T?tab=summary&timestamp=1057.0)
          - [**Timeline:** Publishing begins in week 5 after quality calibration. BitSight can opt out before the 12-month execution phase.](https://fathom.video/share/ksZD4cX6CMXABFzbNjvDSpNoLfsrap7T?tab=summary&timestamp=1127.0)

### Execution: AI Workflows & Human Oversight

  - [**Brief Generation:** An agentic workflow creates detailed briefs from a topic, artifacts, and SEO data.](https://fathom.video/share/ksZD4cX6CMXABFzbNjvDSpNoLfsrap7T?tab=summary&timestamp=1276.0)
  - [**Article Generation Workflow:**](https://fathom.video/share/ksZD4cX6CMXABFzbNjvDSpNoLfsrap7T?tab=summary&timestamp=1500.0)
      - [**Research:** An agent generates a research plan and synthesizes findings, looping until a quality score is met.](https://fathom.video/share/ksZD4cX6CMXABFzbNjvDSpNoLfsrap7T?tab=summary&timestamp=1553.0)
      - [**Drafting:** An agent drafts the article, looping until it meets writing guidelines.](https://fathom.video/share/ksZD4cX6CMXABFzbNjvDSpNoLfsrap7T?tab=summary&timestamp=1620.0)
      - [**Fact-Checking:** An agent validates every sentence against sources. If validation fails, it suggests a rewrite for a human editor.](https://fathom.video/share/ksZD4cX6CMXABFzbNjvDSpNoLfsrap7T?tab=summary&timestamp=1650.0)
  - [**Human Oversight:** Experts manage workflows, make edits, and provide instructions.](https://fathom.video/share/ksZD4cX6CMXABFzbNjvDSpNoLfsrap7T?tab=summary&timestamp=1664.0)
  - [**Publishing:** GrowthX publishes directly to `bitsight.com` (blog section) to ensure seamless execution.](https://fathom.video/share/ksZD4cX6CMXABFzbNjvDSpNoLfsrap7T?tab=summary&timestamp=713.0)

### Reporting & ROI

  - [GrowthX provides dashboards to track performance and demonstrate ROI.](https://fathom.video/share/ksZD4cX6CMXABFzbNjvDSpNoLfsrap7T?tab=summary&timestamp=1227.0)
      - [**Looker Dashboard:** For content performance analytics.](https://fathom.video/share/ksZD4cX6CMXABFzbNjvDSpNoLfsrap7T?tab=summary&timestamp=1227.0)
      - [**Scrunch Dashboard:** For AI monitoring and performance.](https://fathom.video/share/ksZD4cX6CMXABFzbNjvDSpNoLfsrap7T?tab=summary&timestamp=1227.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Tyler:** Share the meeting recording and presentation deck with Michael.](https://fathom.video/share/ksZD4cX6CMXABFzbNjvDSpNoLfsrap7T?tab=summary&timestamp=1740.0)
  - [**Michael:** Share the recording and deck with the SEO Lead (Ali) and Content Strategist (Christy).](https://fathom.video/share/ksZD4cX6CMXABFzbNjvDSpNoLfsrap7T?tab=summary&timestamp=1740.0)
  - [**BitSight Team:** Review materials and follow up via email to continue the conversation.](https://fathom.video/share/ksZD4cX6CMXABFzbNjvDSpNoLfsrap7T?tab=summary&timestamp=1740.0)
